name: Khalil Mayden

profile.major: Arts, Technology & the Business of Innovation
profile.belief: The invisible wall drops when you design for the person it was excluding before they ask.
profile.working_on: Government portal rebuild where screen readers finally navigate like ears were part of the design intent.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a profound commitment to inclusivity, believing that true accessibility comes from anticipating needs and empowering those often overlooked.
